claim_boundary: Dry-run metadata only; no live ingestion, validation, alerting, or production readiness claimed.
guardrails: Verify current feed URLs before relying on them.
Preserve original URL and retrieval timestamp.
Keep BBC language-service framing separate from independent wire corroboration.

purpose: Verify BBC World Service RSS availability and multilingual global-news metadata capture.
